user_prompt: Ready the power cell for calibration
prayer:
Approach the power cell with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Canticle of Calibration upon the power cell's sacred core, aligning its blessed capacitors.
Anoint the power cell's terminals with sacred oils to harmonize its holy voltage flows.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the power cell to yield to precise calibration rites.
Verify equilibrium through auspex incantations, praising the power cell's restored purity.

prayer:
Gather before the noble Chimera APC, intoning the Hymn of Rejuvenation.

Petition the Omnissiah to infuse the Chimera APC with unyielding vigor during charging.
Monitor the blessed influx with electro-seer chants until full potency is achieved.
